items.title: Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
items.dek: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.
items.body: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Civilians feared killed after reports of air strike on Nigerian market
items.dek: The Nigerian Air Force has not addressed reports it struck a village market while targeting militants.
items.body: The Nigerian Air Force has not addressed reports it struck a village market while targeting militants.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iowa State's Momcilovic entering NBA draft, portal
items.dek: Iowa State star forward Milan Momcilovic is entering the NBA draft and the transfer portal, he announced on Sunday.
items.body: Iowa State star forward Milan Momcilovic is entering the NBA draft and the transfer portal, he announced on Sunday.
